name: ariana-framework
description: Ariana Framework version one release candidate with stable API gates and npm package artifacts.

scripts.build: tsc -b packages/core packages/compiler packages/router packages/forms packages/query packages/rendering packages/vite-plugin packages/create-ariana examples/counter-app
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/core packages/compiler packages/router packages/forms packages/query packages/rendering packages/vite-plugin packages/create-ariana examples/counter-app --pretty
scripts.bench:framework: npm --prefix benchmarks/framework-comparison install --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix benchmarks/framework-comparison run bench
scripts.benchmark:micro: npm --prefix benchmarks/micro-update install && npm --prefix benchmarks/micro-update run bench
scripts.benchmark:list: npm --prefix benchmarks/list-update install && npm --prefix benchmarks/list-update run bench
scripts.benchmark:ops: npm --prefix benchmarks/list-operations install && npm --prefix benchmarks/list-operations run bench
scripts.benchmark:router: npm --prefix benchmarks/router install && npm --prefix benchmarks/router run bench
scripts.benchmark:ast: npm --prefix benchmarks/compiler-ast install && npm --prefix benchmarks/compiler-ast run bench
scripts.benchmark:forms: npm --prefix benchmarks/forms install && npm --prefix benchmarks/forms run bench
scripts.benchmark:query: npm --prefix benchmarks/query install && npm --prefix benchmarks/query run bench
scripts.benchmark:rendering: npm --prefix benchmarks/rendering install && npm --prefix benchmarks/rendering run bench
scripts.benchmark:release: npm run benchmark:ops && npm run benchmark:router && npm run benchmark:ast && npm run benchmark:forms && npm run benchmark:query && npm run benchmark:rendering
